description_long: This object is a vintage-style motorized unicycle with a robust black metal frame and a single large wheel. The front features a rounded fender adorned with a star emblem and several metallic bolts, while the handlebars are wrapped in dark brown grips. The engine is exposed, showing copper and steel components, and the exhaust pipe curves along the side in a weathered brass finish. The seat is a classic brown leather saddle, supported by visible springs for shock absorption. Additional details include a rear-mounted license plate, a small cylindrical storage compartment on top of the tank, and red coil suspension elements. The overall design combines retro aesthetics with mechanical complexity, making it suitable for urban environments as a unique personal vehicle.
description: A vintage motorized unicycle with a black metal frame, brown leather saddle, exposed engine, and retro detailing, including a star-emblazoned front fender and red coil suspension.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded fender with a star emblem, handlebars, and the single large wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the exposed engine, curved exhaust pipe, red coil suspension, and brown leather saddle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown saddle, rear-mounted license plate, and the cylindrical storage compartment on the tank.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the engine, exhaust, frame structure, and the spring-supported saddle.
attribute_frame_design: reinforced tubular frame with exposed engine and retro styling
